---
applyTo: '**'
---
Consider we are working on a software project with the following description:

"
Project goal is to facilitate the memorization of words in any language. The project allows users to quickly add new words to their personal vocabulary list through the Telegram bot, for example, by using the share feature from a book reader app directly into the bot dialog.

When a word is received, the project normalizes it and looks up its definition in multiple dictionaries. If the definition is not already in the database, it retrieves and saves one or more definitions for caching purposes.

The project also provides a web client interface to help users memorize words using flashcards. The client allows users to start a training session, where a subset of their words is shown one by one. Users can view definitions, and mark each word as remembered or not remembered. After marking, the next word in the training subset is shown. The subset is generated based on the user's word statistics.
"
